name: goal_planning
sandbox_entry: main agent runs Phase A inline, then transfer_to_agent('sandbox_runner') once the recap is confirmed (skill is NOT execution_mode:sandbox — that would auto-transfer on load and kill Phase A)

inputs.scenario_library: references/scenario_library.json (named what-if templates; resolved by run_plan.py)

references_langfuse_only.scenarios.md: Phase-A playbook for choosing what-ifs (main agent loads via load_skill_resource; NOT read by the sandbox)

v1_1_changes: scenario_library.json named templates (relative/anchor resolution in run_plan.py)
forbidden: writing your own engine / projection / Monte-Carlo
substituting a different lib for the compute path
determinism: fixed seed in spec.market_scenario.seed (default 42); same spec -> same output
